body:
Felix, great catching up with you at the [Breakthrough Energy Ventures](orgs/breakthrough-energy-ventures) summit last week — always good to compare notes with someone who's equally deep in the climate infrastructure weeds. I've been thinking more about the conversation we had around grid-edge compute and whether the timing is finally right for a dedicated seed vehicle in that space. At [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital), we're seeing a meaningful uptick in founders who are genuinely technical on both the power systems and the ML stack side, which feels different from the wave we saw in 2023. I'd love to loop you in on one company in particular that I'm doing diligence on right now — not looking to co-invest necessarily, just curious whether Accel has seen anything similar at the Series A stage that might inform how I think about the category ceiling. Would you have 30 minutes sometime next week to jump on a call?

Amara
